document.docAuthor: Zhan, Zhihong, Liu, Yanchen & Young, Daniel K.
document.masterDocTitle: Descriptions of the mature larva and pupa of Pseudopyrochroa facialis (Fairmaire) from Southwest China (Coleoptera: Pyrochroidae: Pyrochroinae), with redescriptions of adult stages and notes on natural history

mods:titleInfo.mods:title: Descriptions of the mature larva and pupa of Pseudopyrochroa facialis (Fairmaire) from Southwest China (Coleoptera: Pyrochroidae: Pyrochroinae), with redescriptions of adult stages and notes on natural history

mods:name.mods:affiliation: Department of Entomology, University of Wisconsin, Madison, WI 53706. zzhan 8 @ wisc. edu; https: // orcid. org / 0000 - 0002 - 2118 - 2689 Metabolic Biology Laboratory, Hainan University, Hainan Prov., China, 570228. liuyanchen _ s @ 163. com; https: // orcid. org / 0000 - 0001 - 6550 - 1971

Department of Entomology, University of Wisconsin, Madison, WI 53706. zzhan 8 @ wisc. edu; https: // orcid. org / 0000 - 0002 - 2118 - 2689 Metabolic Biology Laboratory, Hainan University, Hainan Prov., China, 570228. liuyanchen _ s @ 163. com; https: // orcid. org / 0000 - 0001 - 6550 - 1971

caption.paragraph:
FIGURES 7–10 . Midterm development pupa of
Pseudopyrochroa facialis (Fairmaire)
: 7. Habitus, dorsal; 8. Habitus, ventral; 9. Habitus, left lateral; 10. Abdominal segments 4–8, left lateral.

FIGURES 11–14 . Adult male of
Pseudopyrochroa facialis (Fairmaire)
: 11. Habitus (typical color morph), dorsal; 12. Habitus (light color morph), dorsal; 13. Head: cranial apparatus, dorsal; 14. Head: cranial apparatus, right dorsolateral.
